author: swiSwift
description: Auto-switch CSS snippets, themes— or toggle manually via status bar/floating button. Supports local image backgrounds, font switching with color/opacity/margin - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: nilmarko
manifest.description: Quickly toggle CSS Snippets with a status bar popup. Supports grouping, drag reorder, and i18n.
manifest.name: SwiftSwitch

name: SwiftSwitch

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description: Support background/image switching on mobile; ribbon icon entry; mobile font color/opacity/line-height/margin settings

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description: - **Mac Edit Crash Fix** — Fixed null error when editing snippets via right-click menu on macOS; click event no longer bubbles to overlay and closes popup prematurely

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Font Preload** — System font list preloaded in background after startup; no delay on first hover
- **Startup Speed** — Non-essential init deferred to idle callback
- **Dark/Light Font Color Inversion** — Font color auto-inverts in dark mode
- **Font Color for Side Panels** — Font color applies to side panels
- **Style Memory Fix** — Scroll-wheel background changes properly saved
- **Startup Memory Restore** — Remembered style restored on startup
- **Floating Button Edge** — No hardcoded margin blocking edge placement

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Font Memory** — Style memory now remembers font settings
- **Font Toggle Reversed** — Button shows opposite action
- **Font Section Collapse** — Collapse toggle with persisted state
- **Font Collapse on Close** — Expanded on close = collapsed on next open
- **Font Applied to Side Panels** — Font settings apply to file explorer, search, outline, etc.
- **Image Stretch Mode** — Stretch chip for background images (100% fill), exclusive with Tile
- **Status Bar Font Button** — f chip adds font button; wheel cycles favorites; hover opens font manager
- **Standalone Font Manager** — Bottom-right panel; mouse-leave closes; drag to pin

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Hover Preview** — Hover on snippet/theme/font chips to instantly preview the effect; mouse leave restores previous state; click to apply
- **Font Management** — New Font section with system font chips, favorites, and settings (color, opacity, line height, left/right margin); lazy-loaded on click
- **Font Enable/Disable** — Toggle button in font section header to quickly disable/enable all font customizations
- **Default Font Chip** — First chip in font list resets to system default font
- **Theme Hover Preview** — Hover theme chips to preview theme in real-time without applying
- **Image Chip Preview** — Hover image background chips to preview the image effect on the editor
- **Exclusive Group Preview** — Hover preview on exclusive group chips temporarily disables other group members
- **Drag Refresh Fix** — Dragging snippets out of Background/Image group now properly refreshes both areas
- **Image Click Fix** — Clicking image chips now correctly applies instead of toggling off due to preview state

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description: - Dark/Light Image Auto-Switch - Paired Image Chips - Floating Button Wheel - Delete Preset Persistence - No Delete Confirmation - Default Panel Width

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Eye Care Presets as CSS Snippets** 鈥?Exported all 22 eye care presets to ss-*.css with .theme-dark/.theme-light selectors
- **Background/Image Unified Group** 鈥?Merged background colors and images into a single exclusive group; drag snippets in
- **Mode Switch Visibility** 鈥?Dark/light mode toggle hides when floating button is active
- **Exclusive Background Group** 鈥?Background/Image group is exclusive; image and snippets are mutually exclusive
- **Language-Safe Group Key** 鈥?Fixed __bg__ key prevents duplicate groups on language switch
- **Delete from Background Group** 鈥?Deleting from Background/Image group removes the file entirely
- **Share/More Link** 鈥?Added GitHub Discussions link in Background/Image section header

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Open Folder Fix** — Fixed background image folder button not working; switched to child_process.exec
- **Header Bar Redesign** — Removed standalone white header bar; header flows naturally with popup content
- **Horizontal Scrollbar Fix** — Removed unwanted horizontal scrollbar in management popup
- **Resize Handle Repositioned** — Resize handle at true bottom-right corner (SwiftGloss style)
- **Wheel Event Violation Fix** — Added passive:false to wheel event listener
- **Click Handler Performance** — Deferred popup opening to avoid blocking click handler

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Status Bar Editable** — Right-click status bar button to edit text and CSS style, with live preview
- **Context Menu Overflow Fix** — Status bar right-click menu auto-adjusts position to stay within screen
- **Version Auto-Read** — Popup version tag now reads from manifest instead of hardcoded value
- **Snippet Edit Error Handling** — Failed to read snippet file now shows Notice with details instead of silent empty form
- **Debug Console Logs** — Added console logging for snippet edit file read operations

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Image Background / 图片背景** — Support local image backgrounds from pic folder; auto-detected and displayed as pill-shaped chips
- **Tile Mode / 平铺模式** — Added Tile option for image backgrounds to repeat small images instead of cover
- **Opacity Control / 透明度控制** — Inline opacity slider in title row when an image is selected
- **Minimap Fix / 小地图修复** — Fixed SwiftMatch minimap being displaced by image background CSS
- **Plugin Dir Helper / 插件目录辅助** — Added _getPluginDir() with fallback chain to fix image loading path issues
- **Image Section Redesign / 图片区重设计** — New title with help tooltip; controls in title row, no duplicate display

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Silent Page Switch** — No more notification popups when switching pages
- **Popup Scroll-through Fix** — Mouse wheel properly passes through popup overlay
- **Pull Cord Fix** — Pull cord no longer stretches the popup layout
- **Indicator Button Redesign** — Compact circular gradient button; click toggles floating button, pull cord switches mode
- **Stable Scrollbar** — scrollbar-gutter: stable prevents chip reflow
- **Dialog Protection** — Adding/deleting groups no longer closes the popup

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Page Style Memory** — Remember each page's theme, dark/light mode, eye care color, and enabled snippets; auto-restore on page switch
- **Exclusive Groups** — Snippets in exclusive groups cannot be enabled simultaneously
- **Floating Button Toggle** — Dark/light indicator button toggles floating button visibility; pull cord switches mode
- **Popup Scroll-through** — Mouse wheel events pass through the popup overlay
- **Stable Scrollbar** — scrollbar-gutter: stable prevents chip reflow
- **Snippet Cache** — In-memory cache fixes stale chip status

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Meditation Breathing** — Added 4-7-8 breathing and Box breathing guided visual animations
- **Edge Glow** — Screen edge glow breathing effect
- **Cursor Glow** — Mouse-following radial glow with breathing
- **Scroll Wheel Swap** — Scroll cycles eye care colors; Ctrl/Shift+scroll switches themes
- **Breathing Chip Hints** — Hover on breathing chips to see rhythm description

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Pull Cord Fix** — Fixed pull cord not hiding after drag, stale event listeners causing ghost pull cord
- **Floating Button Cleanup** — Properly cleanup global event listeners when recreating floating button on mode switch

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Rename to SwiftSwitch** — Plugin renamed from SwiftSnippets to SwiftSwitch (id unchanged)
- **Eye Care Patterns** — Added 6 textured eye care presets: linen, dots, grid, stripe, aurora, breathe
- **Dark Mode Eye Care** — All eye care presets now have dark mode counterparts with auto-switching
- **Floating Button Redesign** — New default gradient style: tangerine (dark) / grey (light)
- **Popup Position Memory** — Popup remembers its position after being dragged
- **Feedback Chip** — Added a Feedback link to GitHub in the popup footer

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Fix Description / 修复描述** — Removed Obsidian from plugin description per community plugin guidelines
- **Fix Release Workflow / 修复发布工作流** — Removed non-existent styles.css from release workflow, added write permission

releases.author: dlsdgj
releases.description:
- **Initial Release / 首次发布** — SwiftSnippets is a status bar popup for quickly toggling Obsidian CSS Snippets
- **Status Bar Button / 状态栏按钮** — Click SwiftSnippets in the status bar to open the management popup
- **Toggle Snippets / 切换 Snippet** — Click any snippet chip to enable/disable instantly
- **Custom Groups / 自定义分组** — Right-click empty space to add groups, drag snippets into them
- **Drag & Drop / 拖拽排序** — Drag snippet chips between groups or back to Ungrouped
- **Fold/Expand Groups / 折叠展开分组** — Click group header to collapse/expand, state persisted
- **i18n / 中英文切换** — Switch between Chinese and English via CN/EN toggle
- **Right-click Menu / 右键菜单** — Copy content, edit, edit (open externally), delete, move to group
- **Add New Snippet / 添加新 Snippet** — Create new CSS snippets directly from the popup
